zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix de Châtillon於1257年出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，她的父親Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III29歲，母親Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant33歲。她和Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1304年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾享年47歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷維特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix de Châtillon于1257年出生在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，她的父亲Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III29岁，母亲Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant33岁。她和Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1304年在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾享年47岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷維特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix de Châtillon was born in 1257, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, her father, Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III, was 29 and her mother, Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, was 33. She had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu. She died in 1304, in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 47, and was buried in Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix de Châtillon est née en 1257, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu. Elle est décédée en 1304, à Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix de Châtillon 1257 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III 29 und ihre Mutter Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant 33. Sie hatte mit Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1304 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Châtillon è nata il nel 1257 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu. Morì nel 1304, nel Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Châtillonが1257年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol IIIは29歳，母Matilda, countess of artois of Brabantは33歳であった。彼女はJean I de Brienne Count of Euとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1304年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-プオル-スル-テルノイゼで47歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスフルeベントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Châtillon(이)가 1257년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1304년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-포-수-터노이스에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 프e븐트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Châtillon nasceu em 1257, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu. Ela faleceu em 1304, em Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix de Châtillon родилась в 1257 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, 33. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu. Она умерла в 1304 г. в местности сеинт-пол-сур-тирноис, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности фрeвент, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix de Châtillon nació en 1257, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu. Murió en 1304, en Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
